title: Miku Songs
description: Is just a short mod that adds 9 songs from Miku into the game.
body:
# Is just a short mod that adds 9 songs from Miku into the game.
I made this for [The Hatsune Miku Jam](https://www.planetminecraft.com/jam/miku/) on planet Mincraft
![Playing a song](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afa7049b7dfbf126dc585297ab7d50d812af9ede.png)
## Includes
- M@GICAL☆CURE! LOVE SHOT!
- Miku
- Mezmerizer
- Senbonzakura
- Antenna 39
- Melomeriods
- Ievan Polkka
- Triple Baka
- PoPiPo
